prompt_task: read.proportions.q1.fa contains a synthetic genome with four chromosomes. read.proportions.q1.fq.gz contains 40,000 single-end 36 bp reads drawn from this genome. A read is generated by first picking a chromosome with probability pi =(pi_1, ..., pi_4), then sampling a position uniformly along that chromosome, with some small error rate. Estimate pi and report four integers (percentages) in FASTA contig order (chr1–chr4), each rounded to the nearest 5; if needed, adjust the last value so the total is 100. Expected output format: 15,25,25,35. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
